title: Coordinator Scenarios: Total Hits (l7d)
description: Total number of events matching any of the 15 oci-coordinator hunting scenarios over the last 7 days. Combines Linux audit/syslog, OCI Audit, APM application, and web/WAF sources.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' and (msg like '*nc -lvp*' or msg like '*ncat -lvp*' or msg like '*socat TCP-LISTEN*' or msg like '*boopkit*' or msg like '*bpftool prog load*' or msg like '*/sys/fs/bpf/*' or msg like '*nsenter -t 1*' or msg like '*release_agent*' or msg like '*insmod /tmp/*' or msg like '*insmod /dev/shm/*' or msg like '*>> /etc/passwd*' or msg like '*> /etc/shadow*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/*' or msg like '*/dev/tcp/*' or msg like '*bash -i >&*' or msg like '*/var/www/html/*' or msg like '*169.254.169.254*' or msg like '*ppid=python*' or msg like '*ppid=node*' or msg like '*ppid=java*' or msg like '*ppid=php*' or msg like '*cat /etc/shadow*') | stats count as TotalHits
